title: Red Dark Oak
description: Removes green tint from dark oak leaves, and makes them red instead.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Red Dark Oak gives dark oak leaves a red tinted texture, and the color of the leaves on the sapling.
